layoutPrompt: Which layout? (preview them in Settings → Gallery layouts)
needVision: The comic flow needs a vision checker: use a main model that accepts image input, or assign an Image recognition model in Settings → Media models — then send `continue`.
mascotMissing: The approved image is not at {{path}} — ask the model to Move it there, then send `continue`.
badLayout: Unknown layout "{{id}}" — pick a handle from GalleryOptions (counts: {{counts}}), then send `continue`.
countMismatch: The script has {{panels}} panels but layout {{layout}} takes {{count}} — adjust the plan, then send `continue`.
badBest: "{{best}}" does not match any generated attempt of this head — the agent must return the attempt NUMBER from the tool result. Send `continue` to retry.
noAnchor: Panel 1 has no visual reference — replan it with at least one mascot or a pasted reference image, then send `continue`.
panelsMissing: Panel {{panel}} is not secured yet — generate it first (`frame` with the flow state), then send `continue` to compose.
unknownMascot: The plan casts {{names}} but no such mascot is registered (registered: {{roster}}). Create the mascot first, or replan using the exact registered name — then send `continue`.
setAvatarsDirHint: Workspace folder for mascots and their bibles.
setComicsDirHint: Workspace folder finished comics land in (one subfolder per comic).
setMaxHint: Generation attempts per job before the agent must choose the best one (1–30).
